items.text: A candle burns for every wallet that still believes. Paper hands may confess; diamond hands may testify. Hold your own keys and your own nerve.
The faithful gather where liquidity meets conviction. The chain remembers every offering. Hold your own keys and your own nerve.
A candle burns for every wallet that still believes. The chain remembers every offering. No financial advice. Only scripture from the chain.
The altar is quiet, but the ledger is awake. Faith is liquidity. No financial advice. Only scripture from the chain.

The market trembles; the chapel does not. Paper hands may confess; diamond hands may testify. Say AMEN.
